audience: Owners and operations leaders in established Sydney service businesses
problem: Routine marketing operations work is spread across people and systems, creating checking, chasing and double handling.
single_message: Automate campaign preparation without automating judgement
supporting_points: Map the real workflow before choosing technology
Automate repeated movement and rule-based actions
Keep exceptions, relationships and accountability human
angle: Automate campaign preparation without automating judgement
headline_options: Automate campaign preparation without automating judgement
A lighter way to handle marketing operations
caption_hook_options: Where does marketing operations get stuck?
The hidden work around marketing operations
selected_hook: Where does marketing operations get stuck?
caption_cta: Consider where the same work repeats in your business
visual_concept: A massive industrial machine swallows an avalanche of marketing administration and outputs one clean finished workflow
image_generation_prompt: A massive industrial paper-crushing machine swallows an avalanche of campaign briefs, approvals, reports, CRM printouts and follow-up sheets, then outputs one clean finished campaign card. Dramatic low angle, one dominant focal object, visible motion and tension, deep forest green, warm bone, graphite and muted brass. No people, offices, desks, plants, laptops, phones, robots, holograms, text or logos.
article_outline: A practical way to improve it
promotion_hypothesis: The marketing operations problem is recognisable, the hook is direct and the visual can explain a practical improvement without hype.
